title: Aureline alpha sync device-registry surface row
description: Alpha-facing device-registry projection consumed by workspace profile export/import and conflict-review surfaces. The packet composes with schemas/settings/sync_device_record.schema.json and carries only export-safe identity, revision, transport state, identity mode, and local-only fallback posture. Raw hostnames, serials, IP addresses, device secrets, credentials, and machine-local paths never appear.

device_id.description: Opaque device id. Never a raw hostname, serial, MAC address, or account id.

device_revision_ref.description: Opaque revision or lineage cursor safe for support and review surfaces.

transport_state.description: Transport state rendered independently from device identity.

local_fallback_posture.description: Fallback posture. Any degraded, unavailable, or refused transport resolves to local-only authoritative, manual continuity, or refused; it never pretends the device is synced.

identity_mode.description: Identity mode at registration. A profile import or sync apply may not use this value to widen local trust.
